name: Enosis
short_description: In Enosis you explore a dystopian version of our planet, collect resources and have to escape or destroy all the creatures from legends and myths, uncover the truth about this world and free humanity or simply take care of yourself.
detailed_description:
In ENOSIS you will immerse yourself in a world mixed with futuristic and fantasy content.  You are NOT the legendary hero or a “superhuman”. You are a completely normal person who has to find your way again in a brutal, dystopian apocalyptic world after a severe blow of fate and in the process explore this world and bring one truth or another to light. You will be attacked and eaten by various monsters and creatures that were actually only found in myths and legends. 

You go on so-called “RAIDS” to get resources that in turn pay your rent and living expenses. But you and everyone else have apparently been lied to about the “old world.” What really happened to our earth? Why do the labyrinths exist? Have elves and dwarves always been in our world? Find out.

By purchasing Enosis you are supporting me in improving my equipment and being able to invest more time in the development of such projects. If enough people buy this game, I will upload the full version as soon as possible. 

Since my Traitorhunt project has become more extensive than planned and the hunt for licenses has become more time-consuming, Enosis will be my first published project. 

I take the following view: Once you buy a game, it's yours: That means all updates and DLCs won't cost anything extra.

This also applies to the next projects: -> See TRAITORHUNT

Please note that I am constantly developing this project and there is still a lot missing in terms of graphic design, audio design and dubbing. I will provide the new content and improvements as an update soon.

The final update will include multiplayer and base building, with a trading system.

I'm always open to criticism, but stay fair. You can also request content or changes, I will check these and incorporate them if you like them.

So thank you very much and have fun!
